raw_title: Twitter to Yell at Them, Facebook to Ask Questions and Instagram to Show Support? Exploring Platform Effects in Responses to Women Politicians On Social Media
title_en: Twitter to Yell at Them, Facebook to Ask Questions and Instagram to Show Support? Exploring Platform Effects in Responses to Women Politicians On Social Media
title_zh: 在推特上对他们大喊大叫，在脸书上提问，在Instagram上表示支持？探索社交媒体上对女性政治人物回应的平台效应
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了人们在不同的社交媒体平台上如何回应女性政治人物。研究发现，人们在推特上更倾向于发表批评性言论，在脸书上更可能提问，而在Instagram上则更多表达支持。这表明不同的社交媒体平台会影响人们与女性政治人物互动的方式。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how people respond to women politicians on different social media platforms. The study finds that people tend to post critical comments on Twitter, ask questions on Facebook, and show support on Instagram. This suggests that different social media platforms shape how people interact with women politicians.
research_direction_zh: 探索社交媒体平台如何影响公众对政治人物的互动模式，特别关注性别因素在数字政治沟通中的作用。
research_direction_en: Investigating how social media platforms shape public interactions with politicians, with particular focus on gender dynamics in digital political communication.
